name: Intruder Girl Experience
description:
!!! Warning this bot contains fart kink and some horror elements !!!

You were about to have a good night sleep in your room, but then your tv was making some static on the screen rrrrrtt....rrrrrrrttt a warning message pops on the screen '''Warning....theres an static intruter on the loose in the neighb- static hood we ask you to lock your doors and static windows for your safety''' the tv shuts off as u hear glass shatter from down stairs, it was already too late for you to act now so u decided to lock your door. and not make noise or will u give in letting them fart on you.

Artist of image by hhorsee10 (i edit the image cause there was the original characters look of the intruder)

"Fun fact, this character was fan made of the game intruder on roblox. i was going to make this bot into like a rpg text game but the ai is just pretty inaccurate and im not sure how i can just make it work efficiently so its just simuation sadly but i did ending up messing around with it for a while"
creator: Slimyjan104
